## Safety

- The add-on remains read-only to the BMS.
- No BMS settings are changed.
- No protection thresholds are written to the BMS.
- No FET control commands are sent.

## Post-Install Checks

- [ ] Add-on starts correctly.
- [ ] MQTT connects.
- [ ] Home Assistant sensors update.
- [ ] Web UI opens.
- [ ] Overall Status is correct.
- [ ] Data Stale is OFF during normal operation.
- [ ] Test Telegram works.
- [ ] Test MQTT works.
